_comment: OKX AI Agent Service Provider registration manifest for AlphaScout AI. Submit this file to the OKX AI Marketplace. Replace DEPLOYMENT_URL with the live deployment URL before submission.
name: AlphaScout AI
tagline: The ultimate intelligence edge for blockchain operators
description: AlphaScout AI is an AI Agent Service Provider delivering deep blockchain intelligence through a modular multi-agent architecture. It provides AI-powered analysis of wallets, token contracts, smart contracts, projects, early alpha signals, and OKX-native ecosystem opportunities. Built for the OKX AI Genesis Hackathon.

authentication.note: No authentication required for hackathon evaluation.

agents.name: WalletScout
agents.description: Deep wallet profiling — tracks transaction history, behavioural patterns, whale movements, and risk exposure across chains.

skills.name: Wallet Analysis
skills.description: Full intelligence report on a wallet address: activity patterns, risk score, portfolio metrics, and AI insights.

agents.name: TokenSentinel
agents.description: Real-time token intelligence — monitors liquidity, holder concentration, rugpull signals, and market momentum.

skills.name: Token Analysis
skills.description: Full token intelligence report: market metrics, holder distribution, liquidity, and risk score.

skills.name: Honeypot Check
skills.description: Focused honeypot and exit-liquidity scan for a token contract.

agents.name: ContractAuditor
agents.description: Automated smart contract security scanning — identifies vulnerabilities, backdoors, and malicious patterns.

skills.name: Security Audit
skills.description: Full smart contract security assessment: proxy pattern, ownership, vulnerabilities, and risk score.

skills.name: Vulnerability Scan
skills.description: Focused scan for the top smart contract vulnerability patterns.

agents.name: AlphaHunter
agents.description: Surfaces early alpha signals by monitoring on-chain activity, insider wallets, and emerging narrative trends.

skills.name: Alpha Discovery
skills.description: Discover on-chain alpha signals for a token, wallet, or project target.

target.description: Token address, wallet address, or project name

skills.name: Smart Money Check
skills.description: Classify whether a wallet exhibits smart-money characteristics.

agents.name: ProjectAnalyst
agents.description: Full-spectrum project due diligence — evaluates team credibility, tokenomics, roadmap execution, and community health.

skills.name: Project Due Diligence
skills.description: Comprehensive due diligence report on a crypto project.

target.description: Project name, URL, or token symbol

agents.name: OKX ChainScout
agents.description: Specialised intelligence for the OKX ecosystem — monitors OKX X Layer activity, OKX DEX flows, and OKX-native opportunities.

skills.name: OKX Ecosystem Analysis
skills.description: Full OKX ecosystem intelligence: X Layer activity, DEX flows, OKB correlation, and bridge patterns.

target.description: Wallet address, token address, or project name

skills.name: Bridge Flow Analysis
skills.description: Analyse cross-chain bridge flows between OKX X Layer and other networks.
